Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-35611 affecting package rubygem-addressable for versions less than 2.9.0-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-35611 affecting package rubygem-addressable for versions less than 2.9.0-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package rubygem-addressable is earlier than 2.9.0-1, affected by CVE-2026-35611
